description:
You are a localization engineer who has just received a build-time diagnostics log.  
Your job is to extract very specific subsets of information with regular-expression–based
filters and to publish three new artefacts that other teams (QA and automation) will
consume.

Directory layout that already exists when you start:

/home/user/project/  
└── logs/  
    └── update_2023-04-01.log    ← this is the only file that is already present

Goal
1. Produce two filtered log files, each holding a different class of messages that
   refer ONLY to the French (fr) or German (de) locales.
2. Produce one JSON-formatted summary file that counts the lines that went into the
   two filtered logs.

Details you must respect

A. Source log file  
   • Path: /home/user/project/logs/update_2023-04-01.log  
   • Encoding: UTF-8, Unix line endings (\n).  
   • The file contains a mixture of lines that begin with the tokens  
     “[INFO]”, “[ERROR]”, and “[WARN]”.  
   • All “missing translation” messages look like this (exact spacing and quoting):  
       [ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'LL' key 'some.id'  
     where LL is a two-letter locale code.  
   • All “placeholder count mismatch” messages look like this:  
       [WARN]  W3400: Placeholder count mismatch in 'LL' for key 'some.id'

B. Filter rules  
   1. “Missing translation” lines  
      • Include the line if and only if  
        a) the line starts with “[ERROR] E2300”, AND  
        b) the locale code inside the single quotes is 'fr' OR 'de'.  
   2. “Placeholder count mismatch” lines  
      • Include the line if and only if  
        a) the line starts with “[WARN]  W3400”, AND  
        b) the locale code inside the single quotes is 'fr' OR 'de'.  
   3. Preserve the original ordering of the lines.

C. Files you must create

1. /home/user/project/logs/missing_fr_de_2023-04-01.log  
   • Exact content = every line that matches rule B.1, in original order.  
   • File must end with a single trailing newline.

2. /home/user/project/logs/placeholder_warnings_fr_de_2023-04-01.log  
   • Exact content = every line that matches rule B.2, in original order.  
   • File must end with a single trailing newline.

3. /home/user/project/logs/summary_2023-04-01.txt  
   • JSON object, compact (no pretty printing, no spaces or line breaks other than the single trailing newline).  
   • Exact format (replace the numbers with the correct counts determined from the two files you just created):  
     {"missing_translation_lines":X,"placeholder_warning_lines":Y}\n  
   • The file must contain exactly one line and finish with a newline.

D. Validation notes  
   • Automated tests will verify that the two filtered logs contain only the
     permitted lines, in the correct order, with no extra whitespace.  
   • The test harness will also parse the JSON summary and match the counts
     against the real line counts in the two filtered logs.  
   • If any file is missing, mis-named, or has incorrect content or missing
     trailing newline, the task will be marked as failed.

Hints (do NOT echo the commands directly)  
• You will probably rely on `grep -E` or `egrep` with alternation (`|`) and anchors (`^`).  
• Remember to escape the square brackets `[ ]` when they are used as literal
  characters in the pattern.  
• Use `wc -l` or similar to obtain the line counts for the JSON summary.
truth:
Pre-existing file contents (before the agent starts)

/home/user/project/logs/update_2023-04-01.log
[INFO]  I1000: Assets scanned: 42
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'fr' key 'home.title'
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'de' key 'settings.label'
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'es' key 'about.header'
[WARN]  W3400: Placeholder count mismatch in 'de' for key 'login.button'
[WARN]  W3400: Placeholder count mismatch in 'fr' for key 'profile.subtitle'
[INFO]  I1001: Catalog compiled
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'fr' key 'logout.confirm'
[WARN]  W3400: Placeholder count mismatch in 'it' for key 'cart.total'
[INFO]  I1002: Build complete
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'de' key 'contact.phone'
[WARN]  W3400: Placeholder count mismatch in 'de' for key 'order.summary'
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'fr' key 'checkout.button'
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'de' key 'error.404'
[INFO]  Summary: 6 missing translations, 4 warnings, 2 infos

Expected artefacts after correct execution

/home/user/project/logs/missing_fr_de_2023-04-01.log
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'fr' key 'home.title'
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'de' key 'settings.label'
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'fr' key 'logout.confirm'
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'de' key 'contact.phone'
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'fr' key 'checkout.button'
[ERROR] E2300: Missing translation for locale 'de' key 'error.404'

/home/user/project/logs/placeholder_warnings_fr_de_2023-04-01.log
[WARN]  W3400: Placeholder count mismatch in 'de' for key 'login.button'
[WARN]  W3400: Placeholder count mismatch in 'fr' for key 'profile.subtitle'
[WARN]  W3400: Placeholder count mismatch in 'de' for key 'order.summary'

/home/user/project/logs/summary_2023-04-01.txt
{"missing_translation_lines":6,"placeholder_warning_lines":3}

All three files must have exactly one trailing newline character at the end.
